meta.description: Mend Lab is a science-driven recovery and wellness clinic in Cairo, offering cupping therapy, dry needling, recovery massage and tailored recovery sessions.

hero.title: Recover Smarter. Perform Better.
hero.subtitle: Mend Lab blends evidence-based recovery science with hands-on therapy to help you move, heal, and feel your best.

mission.title: Recovery, redefined by science
mission.body: We believe recovery is not a luxury — it is a discipline. At Mend Lab, every treatment is grounded in physiology and delivered by specialists who treat your body as the high-performance system it is. From ancient cupping traditions refined with modern technique to precision dry needling, we help you bounce back faster and stay resilient.

why.title: Why Choose Mend Lab
why.subtitle: A clinical experience built around results, comfort, and trust.

items.title: Science-Driven Protocols
items.body: Treatments grounded in physiology and current recovery research — never guesswork.

items.title: Specialist Practitioners
items.body: Certified therapists focused exclusively on recovery, cupping, and soft-tissue care.

items.title: Personalized Plans
items.body: Every session is tailored to your body, goals, and treatment history.

items.title: Clean, Clinical Space
items.body: A calm, hygienic, premium environment designed for genuine rest and healing.

servicesPreview.title: Our Services
servicesPreview.subtitle: Targeted therapies and complete recovery sessions, tailored to you.

cta.title: Ready to feel the difference?
cta.subtitle: Book your first session at Mend Lab and start recovering the smart way.

services.title: Therapies & Recovery Sessions
services.subtitle: Explore individual treatments or complete recovery packages, each delivered with clinical precision.
services.priceNote: Prices may vary depending on duration and treatment plan.

dry-cupping.name: Dry Cupping (Hijama Jaffa)
dry-cupping.short: Suction-based therapy to release tension and boost circulation — no incisions.
dry-cupping.description: Dry cupping, known traditionally as Hijama Jaffa, uses controlled suction from specialised cups placed on the skin. The gentle negative pressure lifts soft tissue, decompresses tight muscles, and stimulates blood flow to accelerate recovery — all without any incisions.
howItWorks: Your therapist assesses target areas and cleans the skin.
Cups are applied and suction is adjusted to your comfort.
Cups rest for a few minutes to decompress tissue and draw fresh circulation.
Cups are removed and the area is gently massaged.

wet-cupping.name: Wet Cupping (Hijama)
wet-cupping.short: Traditional Hijama combining suction with tiny superficial extractions.
wet-cupping.description: Wet cupping (Hijama) combines the suction of dry cupping with light, superficial skin punctures to draw a small amount of stagnant blood. Performed under strict single-use, sterile protocols, it is a time-honoured therapy sought for detoxification and relief of chronic tension.
howItWorks: Skin is sterilised and prepared with the utmost hygiene.
Suction cups are applied to prime the tissue.
Very fine, superficial punctures are made using sterile single-use tools.
Cups are reapplied briefly to draw a small volume, then the area is cleaned and dressed.

flash-cupping.name: Flash Cupping
flash-cupping.short: Rapid, rhythmic cupping to stimulate and warm up soft tissue.
flash-cupping.description: Flash cupping is a dynamic technique where cups are applied and released in quick succession over a treatment area. This rhythmic stimulation warms the tissue, invigorates circulation, and is ideal as a prep or finishing technique within a recovery session.
howItWorks: The target area is identified and lightly oiled if needed.
Cups are rapidly applied and released in a rhythmic sequence.
The technique is repeated across the muscle group.
The area is assessed and the session adjusted to your response.

recovery-massage.name: Recovery Massage
recovery-massage.short: Targeted soft-tissue massage to speed recovery and ease soreness.
recovery-massage.description: Our recovery massage focuses on the muscles and connective tissue that take the most load. Using targeted pressure and mobilisation, it flushes fatigue, reduces soreness, and restores range of motion so you feel ready for your next effort.
howItWorks: A short assessment identifies tight and fatigued areas.
Targeted techniques address soft tissue and mobility.
Pressure is tailored to your comfort and goals.
The session closes with lighter strokes to aid relaxation.

dry-needling.name: Dry Needling
dry-needling.short: Precision needling of trigger points to release stubborn knots.
dry-needling.description: Dry needling uses fine, sterile filament needles to target myofascial trigger points — the tight knots that cause referred pain and restrict movement. By eliciting a local response, it helps release the knot, reduce pain, and restore normal muscle function.
howItWorks: Your therapist locates the responsible trigger points.
A fine, sterile needle is inserted precisely into the point.
A brief local twitch response signals release.
Needles are removed and the area is mobilised.

recovery-sessions.name: Recovery Sessions
recovery-sessions.short: Complete recovery programmes for the upper, lower, or whole body.
recovery-sessions.description: Recovery sessions bring together massage, mobilisation, and complementary techniques into a complete programme tailored to a body region. Choose upper body, lower body, or a full whole-body reset — each designed to leave you loose, restored, and ready.
howItWorks: Choose your focus: upper body, lower body, or whole body.
Your therapist builds a plan for the chosen region.
A combination of recovery techniques is applied.
You receive simple guidance to extend the benefits at home.
benefits: Ideal for athletes and active lifestyles

cupping-sessions.name: Cupping Sessions
cupping-sessions.short: Structured cupping programmes for the upper, lower, or whole body.
cupping-sessions.description: Cupping sessions deliver a structured cupping programme across your chosen body region. Blending dry, flash, and where appropriate wet cupping techniques, each session is designed to decompress tissue, boost circulation, and support recovery across the area.
howItWorks: Choose your focus: upper body, lower body, or whole body.
Your therapist selects the appropriate cupping techniques.
Cups are applied systematically across the region.
The session is adjusted to your comfort and response.

about.title: Where recovery meets science
about.intro: Mend Lab was founded on a simple conviction: that recovery deserves the same rigour, care, and precision as training itself. We built a clinic where proven therapy and modern science come together in a calm, premium space in the heart of Cairo.

story.title: Our Story
story.body: Mend Lab began with a frustration shared by athletes and everyday people alike — recovery was treated as an afterthought. We set out to change that. By combining time-honoured therapies like cupping with evidence-based techniques such as dry needling and structured recovery sessions, Mend Lab offers a genuinely clinical approach to feeling better. Every protocol, every practitioner, and every detail of our space is chosen to help you recover with confidence.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To make science-driven recovery accessible, trustworthy, and effective — helping our clients move well, heal fully, and perform at their best.

items.title: Evidence First
items.body: We follow the science, not trends.

items.title: Personal Care
items.body: Plans built around you, not a template.

items.title: Genuine Results
items.body: We measure success by how you feel and move.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.name: Ahmed Hosny
leadership.bio: Ahmed Hosny founded Mend Lab to raise the standard of recovery care in Egypt. With a passion for performance, physiology, and hands-on therapy, he built Mend Lab around a belief that everyone — from elite athletes to busy professionals — deserves recovery that is clinical, personal, and grounded in science. He leads the team with an uncompromising focus on quality, hygiene, and real, measurable results.
